title: Sao Bras learner the first to complete matric in his family
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  \"I actually feel calm after receiving my results,\" said Luchen Moolman, the second of Sao Bras High School's top three matric learners.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - \"I actually feel calm after receiving my results,\" said Luchen Moolman, the second of Sao Bras High School's top three matric learners."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Class of 2025 received their National Senior Certificate results on Tuesday 13 January."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Moolman is the first person in his family to complete his matric year, as both of his parents were unable to.","html":"Moolman is the first person in his family to complete his matric year, as both of his parents were unable to."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"It's a huge achievement for the family, I'm breaking generational curses,\" he said.","html":"\"It's a huge achievement for the family, I'm breaking generational curses,\" he said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"2025 was a challenge, but one he was able to get through with God's help, he says.","html":"2025 was a challenge, but one he was able to get through with God's help, he says."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Every day I had to wake up and tell myself to keep going, and to ask God to keep me going. He gave me everything I needed.\"","html":"\"Every day I had to wake up and tell myself to keep going, and to ask God to keep me going. He gave me everything I needed.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Moolman told Mossel Bay Advertiser he achieved two distinctions and has plans to begin studying financial accounting at Stellenbosch University this year.","html":"Moolman told Mossel Bay Advertiser he achieved two distinctions and has plans to begin studying financial accounting at Stellenbosch University this year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He is confident he will succeed even more in the future, trusting in himself, his faith and the support of his family.","html":"He is confident he will succeed even more in the future, trusting in himself, his faith and the support of his family."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Sao Bras High achieved a pass rate of 92.6%, an increase from last year's 89.3%."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The school's principal, Henry Willemse, told the Advertiser that the school's motto for the year, 'It can be done, it must be done, it will be done', has definitely become a reality.","html":"The school's principal, Henry Willemse, told the Advertiser that the school's motto for the year, 'It can be done, it must be done, it will be done', has definitely become a reality."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sao Bras High School's principal, Henry Willemse, and the school's top three matric learners, Shanique Bruinders, Luchen Moolman and Tyricq Uithaler. Photo: Gabriélla Siebritz","html":"Sao Bras High School's principal, Henry Willemse, and the school's top three matric learners, Shanique Bruinders, Luchen Moolman and Tyricq Uithaler. Photo: Gabriélla Siebritz"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
